title: convolvulus argillicola
intro: Convolvulus argillicola, also known as the 'Dune Bindweed', is a species of flowering plant in the bindweed family (Convolvulaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Convolvulus argillicola include treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Convolvulus argillicola can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which is often used to treat various ailments.
